title: Keto Bao Cookies
description: A keto twist on traditional bao cookies, made with sweet biscuits and a cream cheese frosting.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a large bowl, combine the sweet biscuits and crushed Oreo.
Mix in the softened cream cheese until a dough forms.
Roll out the dough to about 1/4 inch thickness.
Cut into desired shapes using a cookie cutter.
Place on the prepared baking sheet and bake for 12-15 minutes.
Allow cookies to cool completely on a wire rack.
Beat the heavy cream until stiff peaks form.
Spread or pipe the whipped cream onto the cooled cookies.
